allow: PowerShell($handle = \(& "$env:USERPROFILE\\.platformio\\penv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import serial; s = serial.Serial\('COM14'\); print\('opened'\); s.close\(\)" 2>&1\); Write-Host $handle)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Windows\\System32\\handle64.exe" COM14 2>$null; if \(-not $?\) { Write-Host "handle64 not found, trying handle.exe"; & "C:\\Windows\\System32\\handle.exe" COM14 2>$null }; Write-Host "---"; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "platformio|pio|python|code|monitor|serial" } | Select-Object Name, Id | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; Write-Host "=== /api/info.json ==="; $wc.DownloadString\("http://10.1.1.145/api/info.json"\); Write-Host "`n=== /api/data.json ==="; $wc2 = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc2.DownloadString\("http://10.1.1.145/api/data.json"\))
PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("10.1.1.143", 10081\); Write-Host "Port 10081 OPEN"; $tcp.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "Port 10081 CLOSED: $_" })

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $port.WriteLine\(""\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $out = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); Write-Host $out)

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $port.WriteLine\("status"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; $port.WriteLine\("dtu"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $out = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); Write-Host $out)

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.ReadTimeout = 90000; $port.Open\(\); $lines = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); while \($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -lt 90\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); $lines.Add\($line.Trim\(\)\) } catch {} }; $port.Close\(\); $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "DTU|MQTT|WIFI|Error|error|fail|Conn|conn" } | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.ReadTimeout = 60000; $port.Open\(\); $lines = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); while \($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -lt 55\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); $lines.Add\($line.Trim\(\)\) } catch {} }; $port.Close\(\); $lines)

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $port.WriteLine\("status"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $port.WriteLine\("dtu"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $out = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); $out)

PowerShell($wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; Write-Host "=== info ==="; $wc.DownloadString\("http://10.1.1.145/api/info.json"\); Write-Host "`n=== data ==="; $wc2 = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc2.DownloadString\("http://10.1.1.145/api/data.json"\))

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $port.WriteLine\("loglevel debug"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $out = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); $out)

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.ReadTimeout = 50000; $port.Open\(\); $lines = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; $sw = [System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); while \($sw.Elapsed.TotalSeconds -lt 45\) { try { $line = $port.ReadLine\(\); $lines.Add\($line.Trim\(\)\) } catch {} }; $port.Close\(\); $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match "DTU|DATA|Config|RX|AppInfo|Real|Get" })

PowerShell($port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort "COM14", 115200, "None", 8, "One"; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; $port.WriteLine\("loglevel info"\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $out = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); $out)
